prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为7262→9892→9589→16565→10896名。2024年因新高考改革首年出现异常波动（16565名），2025年迅速回稳至10896名 ，近两年呈先升后降的V形走势，2025年基准位次约10896名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年73人→2022年83人→2023年90人→2024年93人→2025年95人，持续小 幅扩招；2026年计划89人，较2025年减少6人，缩招约6.3%，对竞争有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国海洋大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名2021年第56→ 2022年第57→2023年第62→2024年第57→2025年第56→2026年第51名，近年稳中有升，2026年进入前51名，学校整体实力和认可度持续增强；2023年声誉曾因小语种 专业位次下降被评偏负面，但近年未见明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第21（较热），录取通知书附赠南极海水等话题引发关注，报考热度处于中等偏上水平；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科全国顶尖，对相关专业考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；广西2026年考生总数约39.2万人，较2025年增加约1.24万人，物理类考生估算约26.9万人（增约0.85万人），竞争环境总体趋紧；省控线数据已 纳入参考；该校位于山东青岛，非本省高校，在广西招生占比约2.1%–3.7%，属中等偏低水平；广西考生对沿海985高校的地域偏好总体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10896名、2026年缩招6人（位次前移约413名）与广西物理类考生增加约0.85万人（竞争加剧）的双向作用，缩招效应略大于考生增量效应，但2025年位次已 较2024年大幅回升显示报考热度回暖，预计2026年最低位次约10533名，区间10033–11033名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 7262 → 9892 → 9589 → 16565 → 10896 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was an abnormal fluctuation (16565), but in 2025 it quickly stabilized to 10896. In the past two years, it showed a V-shaped trend of first rising then falling, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 10896. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 73 in 2021 → 83 in 2022 → 90 in 2023 → 93 in 2024 → 95 in 2025, with continuous small expansion. The 2026 plan is 89, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 6.3%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ocean University of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking was 56th in 2021 → 57th in 2022 → 62nd in 2023 → 57th in 2024 → 56th in 2025 → 51st in 2026, showing a steady rise in recent years, entering the top 51 in 2026, with continuously enhanced overall strength and recognition. In 2023, its reputation was rated slightly negative due to a decline in the ranking of minor language majors, but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 21st (relatively hot), and topics such as the admission letter including Antarctic seawater have attracted attention, with application enthusiasm at a medium to high level. It has A+ in Aquaculture, A+ in Marine Science, A- in Biology, and A- in Food Science and Engineering, with marine and fisheries disciplines being top in the country, strongly attracting candidates interested in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 269,000 (an increase of about 8,500), making the competition environment generally tighter. Provincial control line data has been incorporated for reference. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with an enrollment proportion in Guangxi of about 2.1%–3.7%, which is at a medium to low level. Guangxi candidates' regional preference for coastal 985 universities is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 10896, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 6 (ranking shift forward by about 413), and the increase of about 8,500 Physics Category candidates in Guangxi (intensified competition), the reduction effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. However, the 2025 ranking has significantly rebounded compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application enthusiasm. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 10533, with a range of 10033–11033.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable and slightly rising trend in recent years, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2023, there was a negative evaluation due to a decline in rankings for minor language majors, but overall reputation has been stable in recent years. 专业热度与地域.text: Law (slightly hot, recommended), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Accounting (differentiated, wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors have generally stable to slightly hot social popularity. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1967, the significant expansion of 10 places in 2026 (+50%, shifting ranking backward by about 590 places), and the increase of about 3,900 History Category candidates (slightly intensified competition), the expansion effect is significantly greater than the candidate increase effect. However, the 2025 ranking has moved forward compared to 2024, indicating a rebound in application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 2507, with a range of 2056–2958.
